blockers.note: Resolved on 2026-06-18 after the user disabled email confirmation and explicitly approved admin-confirming the existing owned Auth user. API login then succeeded, Browser Use login reached the dashboard with the owned brand, the create_brand RPC migration was applied remotely after the old first-brand flow hit brands RLS 42501, and Browser Use generated one campaign image that appeared in gallery. DB readback confirms the brand, owner membership, generated_images row, and storage_path-backed image. Secret values are not stored in this manifest.

Resolved by historical proof from output/release-prep/next-phase-20260618-parent2/cleanup-delete-readback.json, not by the current parent-goal run. The current parent-goal run did not run cleanup/delete; it only carries this historical resolved status forward.

Resolved by the current-HEAD parent run on 2026-06-18 after initial reset/start attempts failed. The successful retry used the Colima Docker socket, restarted the local DB with valid --exclude names, passed `supabase migration list --local`, completed `supabase db reset --local --no-seed`, passed `SUPABASE_VERIFY_MODE=db bash scripts/supabase-prod-verify.sh`, stopped Supabase, attempted Colima cleanup, and recorded `reset_recreate_ok=true`, `db_verify_ok=true`, and `exact_blocker=null`.

Resolved for current HEAD by the parent-goal run. Browser Use proof was recaptured under output/release-prep/parent-goal-20260618-current-head/browser-use-current/ with release_date 2026-06-18, environment staging, git_commit c80e209f1483dd42dafc43e15bab06346a0b46a0, nonblank home/login pages, visible auth controls, and view-only metadata. `verify:browser-use` passes for that proof, and `release:doctor` has no STOP on current HEAD.
